steps.description: Click on the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu to select it.
Click on the dropdown menu option titled "Weather Agent" under the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" window.
Click the "JavaScript" option in the dropdown menu under the "Programming Language" input field.

Click the "Default folder" option under the "Choose the folder where your project root will be located" dropdown in the Workspace Folder dialog. Ensure the selected folder path is "/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects".
